column2: Loading
Levels

Queen
Leila

Morgana
Nero
Stella
Tricksies
Wilbur
Poor Wilbur! Something is forcing him to do things he is not ready to do!
How many lives does he have left?
There he goes again! WHAT is he trying to summon?
Who cares? Let's enjoy the comedy show!
At least he left the Queen behind!
If there's a cat license, his should be revoked.
Nero, what can we learn from that?
Eat your veggies, or the veggies will eat you!
Now he'll be even easier to follow!
Nice! One more time! Can we pick another color?
No wonder he got expelled from the spy academy!
Hahah! Enough fooling buddy... let's follow the tracks!
That certainly backfired!
His spell failed again, but each time he's getting closer and closer!
If I were the King of this jungle, would you be my Queen?
I'm nobody's Queen, daydreamer! Let's burst some bubbles!
Hahah! It's so funny how some cats go crazy with moving lights!
MUST-CATCH-RED-DOT-NOW
Shiver me timbers! A piraty pirate ship!
Aye, matey! Chaaaaaarge!
Stars! Constellations! We're but tiny specks in the Universe...
Keep eating like that and you'll develop your own gravity field!
There he is again... Complete that summoning once and for all!
Wait! Don't you see a familiar silhouette in the sky?
Underwater!? This is the closest to having a bath that I have ever been.
Now that you mention it...
What a pompous feline family!
Shhh! I'm trying to find my portrait!
So you think it's the Fairy Queen who's been pestering Wilbur?
It certainly feels like her sense of humor!
Music! Shall we dance?
To the tune of my bubble-popping wand!
The summoning should have failed by now!
Quick, Stella! This time I cannot stop him!
Good witches beware, Morgana is back! And I'm more powerful than ever! MWAHAHA!
It was you who bewitched Wilbur! You needed the Fairy Queen's magic to come back!
Yes! Dumb cat, but useful! Now watch me cast darkness all over Witch Country!
His spell is stronger than ever! I have a very bad feeling!
His failure will be more epic than ever, too!
Please Stella, let me help you defeat her! Now I can do magic too!
No! Don't trust him!
No time for rivalries! We must be united to defeat Morgana!
Well spoken! Team Light, let's stop Morgana's darkness!
Why has Wilbur become evil? Why kidnap the Fairy Queen?
Why do these portals smell so funny?
He's sleeping like a log! No! Make that a HOG!
Shhh! Let's take the Queen and duck out!
MWAHAHA! Why are you flying so slow? The show starts soon!
Want to talk about a show? How about the one where we defeated you!
Ladies and cats, it's show time!
Er... What are you up to now?
MWAHAHA! Just wait, I’m gonna steal the show!
Something strange is happening inside of me. Something bad...
Haha! I think you've got a hairball, dude!
I have an eerie feeling! My feline instincts say something is about to happen...
Yes, I can feel it too! Stay alert!
Oh no, wrong place! No trace of him here!
An aspiring magician should know things are never what they seem...
Tricksies! What are you doing here?
Uhhh iaiaia yummy yummy!
Really, you were absorbed by a big hat while you were looking for candies?
Ia! eh eh eh. Boom boom!
Haha! Ok, come with us and let's see how you can help us.
Morgana! Where are we?
At Kaleidoscopia! Where you trapped me.
And we're here because...?
I have business elsewhere… Catch me if you want to know the truth! MWAHAHA!
Dream on, Morgana. We'll catch you and be out of here in no time!
We didn't arrive in time! It's too late! Hold back!
AFÁL NATHRRRR, ORTH' BHÁIS'S BETHAD, DOODLE-DOO DÉNMHA!
Hahah! BRA-VO! ENCORE! ENCORE!
He is not powerful enough ... yet
He's casting a very dark summoning spell! We have to stop him!
Yes! We, no, I, no, YOU first!
Stella! Lovely to see you! I've just 'flambéed' a cake, want some?
Leila, ever so kind! We can't stay, but please come visit my new home soon!
Will do! Wish you a beautiful journey! Why is your friend so scared?
There are no dragons here anymore - right?
Only one way to know! Let's go!
You are very brave! Worry not, we will stop Wilbur and rescue the Queen!
Thank you Stella! The Queen is OK, I saw her laughing at Wilbur!
That brave fairy will keep Wilbur busy for a while!
Now I can say I survived confronting a dragon... without lying!
My dear apprentice, you are the bravest! Now let's go, quick!
There must be a way to open a cat's mouth... what could it be? Nero?
(screaming) ANCHOVIES!!
No, seriously, try to think ... WAIT WHAT?
Are you worried about the Fairy Queen?
She'll be fine, she's immortal! I'm more concerned about poor Wilbur...
NO! NOOOOO!
Don't be fooled, this is another of his tricks!
I really hope so. Let's get there as soon as possible!

Stella! Wilbur kidnapped the Fairy Queen!
What? Wilbur!?? Leave it to me!

The Queen is kidnapped, and my home is destroyed. Could this be any worse!?
First things first! I'll bring her back!
